product.name: 3-Light Rattan Pendant Light,1-Pack Hand-Woven Black White Faux Rattan Hanging Light 15" Boho Basket Wicker Chandelier for Living Room Bedroom Kitchen Dining Hallway
features: 【 Rattan Pendant Light Excellent Design】Natural rattan and faux rattan hand-weave craft, the pendant light shade are made of natural rattan and black and white faux rattan materials. The lights are hand woven with by rattan craft superb skills bamboo artists. Decorated with classic tropical style elements, creates a wonderfully new look

【 Light Size Bulb Requirement】3-Light Faux rattan pendant light,Size 38 * 36 cm,14.96 *14.17", Voltage 110v-240v, Bulb socket and electric cord have passed the UL listed, which can ensure that you use them safely. US standard E26 base socket, maximum 60W, suitable for Incandescent, LED, halogen, CFL, etc.(Bulb Not included)

【Light Fixtures Material】Faux rattan+natural rattan pendant light shade craft is selected from the trees we grow , which undergoes various processing procedures. This Rattan craft is heat resistant, fade resistant, safe and healthy

【Widely Application】Hardwired connection, durable and adjustable black cable 1.8 m L 70.87 included. You can easily adjust the lenght of light cord to fit your room lighting needs. Suitable for different types of living rooms, restaurants, kitchens, dining rooms, laundry rooms, hallways, cafes, basements,corridor, stairwells,bars, clubs, libraries, office, entrance, bedrooms,reading rooms and more

【 Easy installation】Rattan pendant light all mounting hardwares are included and installation process is simple, which just need 5 minutures. open the package when installing the lampshade please gently open the folding lampshade, mounted to the metal bracket, connect to the power supply, press the switch button to turn on or off the light.If you need to find seller support

Notes 1. Natural Materials Our products are made of high-quality bamboo, rattan, and straw rope Since these materials are natural materials, the following conditions may exist: bamboo knots, tiny burrs, slight color differences, micro scars, etc During the use of lamps, the color will change slightly over time, which is a natural change

2. Handmade Products Bamboo woven lamps are purely handmade, and there will be traces of handcrafting on the lamps in detail. Each product will have some differences, such as the following For example, if the interface of the bamboo lampshade ring is slightly larger or the gap is slightly different, it is not a quality problem. If you cannot accept the characteristics of natural materials and handmade products, please purchase with caution, we apologize for the inconvenience
